data.title: Angled With Brass Strapping
data.description:
Our hoods are made from cabinet-grade plywood with a white maple veneer. Brass and Steel Accents are created using a cabinet-grade laminate adhered to a white maple veneer.1
Hoodsly’s wood range hoods come in an array of designs and colors to match your kitchen perfectly. Get your wood range hood in raw, primed/paint ready, or stained/painted. Choose one of our trending colors or match your kitchen with a custom color choice. Designed to be both elegant and effective, each wood range hood was built with our Proprietary Two-Piece Construction for easy installation, allowing for simple cleaning and easy access to fan and ducting.asfd Our hoods are made from cabinet-grade plywood with a white maple veneer. IMPORTANT STAIN INFORMATION: Hoodsly is not responsible for improper staining or painting techniques used to finish a raw hood. We strongly suggest spraying a professional-grade, pre-catalyzed lacquer, from brands such as Gemini, Mohawk, ML Campbell, and Acroma Pro. Wiping Stains, such as Minwax, are not recommended and we highly suggest using a professional product and method. Wiping stains can cause inconsistent staining during the application of the stain. Wood filler, pin nails, knots, mineralization, and multi-dimensional graining are commonly used in our build methods and are not considered defects. Hood liners and blowers are sold separately and in many cases will ship separately from the wood hood.
IMPORTANT WOODWORKING INFORMATION: You should choose a licensed electrician, and/or HVAC Contractor, and a cabinet installation professional to assist with the install. Above all, ensure you are meeting all building codes in your area. While this installation is not difficult, you must have electrical, ventilation, and finish carpentry skills. You may need to cut, sand, chisel, remove “ribs”, install supports and other basic woodworking functions to complete the install. PLEASE NOTE: The product images displayed are computer generated renderings, and actual colors & wood grain may vary depending on the device you're viewing them on. For a clearer understanding of our products and their colors, we recommend exploring our gallery, contacting us directly, or requesting color samples. We're here to ensure you have the most accurate information possible!

shipping_return.title: LTL Shipping – Residential
shipping_return.description:
Due to the size of our hoods, your shipment will come via LTL shipping. If you are not familiar with this type of shipping, there are a few differences from a UPS or FedEx shipping company. The LTL company will call you the day before to schedule your delivery. You MUST schedule your appointment or your item will not be shipped. The LTL driver will provide what is called curbside delivery. They will not bring the item into your house. Please be prepared to receive the shipment, note any shipping related damage on the bill of lading, and bring the item to a safe location.

Turnaround Times

Standard lead times for any wood hood product is 25-30 business days. If you choose our Rush Manufacturing option, your hood will be constructed in 20 business days or less.

Shipping Times

Please allow up to 7 business days for shipping.

shipping_return.title: Custom Color Match Program
shipping_return.description:
We offer two types of color matching to ensure your range hood meets your exact specifications:

Sherwin-Williams Color Match

While customizing your range hood, you have the option to enter a Sherwin-Williams (SW) color code. This allows us to match the color precisely, ensuring your hood blends perfectly with your existing design.

Selecting this option will extend the lead time by one week to accommodate the custom color matching process.

Physical Color Match

If you prefer, you can choose the "Physical Color Match" option during customization. Simply send us a physical sample of the color you want matched.

Turnaround Time

Our current turnaround time for custom color match range hoods is 30-35 business days. This does not include shipping time. Please allow up to 7 business days for shipping.

shipping_return.title: Return Policy
shipping_return.description:
No returns are accepted for custom hoods. If damage is noted, we will gladly supply you with a replacement hood. Please be sure to indicate damage on the bill of lading from the shipping company.

You may return other items in their original condition with the original packaging within 30 days of receipt of the shipment. Product must be shipped back, at your expense, prior to the expiration of the 30-day window. We will issue a full refund for the price of any item you return that is in new condition. We do not accept returns where modification to the product occurred, or installation was attempted. Before staining or finishing an unfinished hood, please consult a professional or call us for suggested finish products. Certain consumer products will not provide the finish quality you may desire. We accept no responsibility for any scheduling mishaps, regardless of the situation.

In Stock, hoods are sold as-is and can only be returned if there is shipping damage. If there is damage to an in-stock hood before it is shipped, it will be noted on the product page.

  • Corbel hoods require a solid bottom, which is automatically included on the order.  The opening for ventilation will need to be cut to fit during installation.

data.description:
Our hoods are made from cabinet-grade plywood with a white maple veneer. Brass and Steel Accents are created using a cabinet-grade laminate adhered to a white maple veneer.
Hoodsly’s wood range hoods come in an array of designs and colors to match your kitchen perfectly. Get your wood range hood in raw, primed/paint ready, or stained/painted. Choose one of our trending colors or match your kitchen with a custom color choice. Designed to be both elegant and effective, each wood range hood was built with our Proprietary Two-Piece Construction for easy installation, allowing for simple cleaning and easy access to fan and ducting. Our hoods are made from cabinet-grade plywood with a white maple veneer. Please Note Reclaimed Band may not look exactly like it is represented on our site because of the difference in wood. IMPORTANT STAIN INFORMATION: Hoodsly is not responsible for improper staining or painting techniques used to finish a raw hood. We strongly suggest spraying a professional-grade, pre-catalyzed lacquer, from brands such as Gemini, Mohawk, ML Campbell, and Acroma Pro. Wiping Stains, such as Minwax, are not recommended and we highly suggest using a professional product and method. Wiping stains can cause inconsistent staining during the application of the stain. Wood filler, pin nails, knots, mineralization, and multi-dimensional graining are commonly used in our build methods and are not considered defects. Hood liners and blowers are sold separately and in many cases will ship separately from the wood hood.
IMPORTANT WOODWORKING INFORMATION: You should choose a licensed electrician, and/or HVAC Contractor, and a cabinet installation professional to assist with the install. Above all, ensure you are meeting all building codes in your area. While this installation is not difficult, you must have electrical, ventilation, and finish carpentry skills. You may need to cut, sand, chisel, remove “ribs”, install supports and other basic woodworking functions to complete the install. PLEASE NOTE: The product images displayed are computer generated renderings, and actual colors & wood grain may vary depending on the device you're viewing them on. For a clearer understanding of our products and their colors, we recommend exploring our gallery, contacting us directly, or requesting color samples. We're here to ensure you have the most accurate information possible!

shipping_return.title: LTL Shipping – Residential
shipping_return.description:
Due to the size of our hoods, your shipment will come via LTL shipping. If you are not familiar with this type of shipping, there are a few differences from a UPS or FedEx shipping company. The LTL company will call you the day before to schedule your delivery. You MUST schedule your appointment or your item will not be shipped. The LTL driver will provide what is called curbside delivery. They will not bring the item into your house. Please be prepared to receive the shipment, note any shipping related damage on the bill of lading, and bring the item to a safe location.

Turnaround Times

Standard lead times for any wood hood product is 25-30 business days. If you choose our Rush Manufacturing option, your hood will be constructed in 20 business days or less.

Shipping Times

Please allow up to 7 business days for shipping.

shipping_return.title: Custom Color Match Program
shipping_return.description:
We offer two types of color matching to ensure your range hood meets your exact specifications:

Sherwin-Williams Color Match

While customizing your range hood, you have the option to enter a Sherwin-Williams (SW) color code. This allows us to match the color precisely, ensuring your hood blends perfectly with your existing design.

Selecting this option will extend the lead time by one week to accommodate the custom color matching process.

Physical Color Match

If you prefer, you can choose the "Physical Color Match" option during customization. Simply send us a physical sample of the color you want matched.

Turnaround Time

Our current turnaround time for custom color match range hoods is 30-35 business days. This does not include shipping time. Please allow up to 7 business days for shipping.

shipping_return.title: Return Policy
shipping_return.description:
No returns are accepted for custom hoods. If damage is noted, we will gladly supply you with a replacement hood. Please be sure to indicate damage on the bill of lading from the shipping company.

You may return other items in their original condition with the original packaging within 30 days of receipt of the shipment. Product must be shipped back, at your expense, prior to the expiration of the 30-day window. We will issue a full refund for the price of any item you return that is in new condition. We do not accept returns where modification to the product occurred, or installation was attempted. Before staining or finishing an unfinished hood, please consult a professional or call us for suggested finish products. Certain consumer products will not provide the finish quality you may desire. We accept no responsibility for any scheduling mishaps, regardless of the situation.

In Stock, hoods are sold as-is and can only be returned if there is shipping damage. If there is damage to an in-stock hood before it is shipped, it will be noted on the product page.

Hoodsly’s wood range hoods come in an array of designs and colors to match your kitchen perfectly. Get your wood range hood in raw, primed/paint ready, or stained/painted. Designed to be both elegant and effective, each wood range hood was built with our Proprietary Two-Piece Construction for easy installation, allowing for simple cleaning and easy access to fan and ducting. Our hoods are made from cabinet-grade plywood with a white maple veneer. IMPORTANT STAIN INFORMATION: Hoodsly is not responsible for improper staining or painting techniques used to finish a raw hood. We strongly suggest spraying a professional-grade, pre-catalyzed lacquer, from brands such as Gemini, Mohawk, ML Campbell, and Acroma Pro. Above all, ensure you are meeting all building codes in your area. While this installation is not difficult, you must have electrical, ventilation, and finish carpentry skills. You may need to cut, sand, chisel, remove “ribs”, install supports and other basic woodworking functions to complete the install. data.description:
Our hoods are made from cabinet-grade plywood with a white maple veneer. Brass and Steel Accents are created using a cabinet-grade laminate adhered to a white maple veneer.
Hoodsly’s wood range hoods come in an array of designs and colors to match your kitchen perfectly. Get your wood range hood in raw, primed/paint ready, or stained/painted. Choose one of our trending colors or match your kitchen with a custom color choice. Designed to be both elegant and effective, each wood range hood was built with our Proprietary Two-Piece Construction for easy installation, allowing for simple cleaning and easy access to fan and ducting. Our hoods are made from cabinet-grade plywood with a white maple veneer. IMPORTANT STAIN INFORMATION: Hoodsly is not responsible for improper staining or painting techniques used to finish a raw hood. We strongly suggest spraying a professional-grade, pre-catalyzed lacquer, from brands such as Gemini, Mohawk, ML Campbell, and Acroma Pro. Wiping Stains, such as Minwax, are not recommended and we highly suggest using a professional product and method. Wiping stains can cause inconsistent staining during the application of the stain. Wood filler, pin nails, knots, mineralization, and multi-dimensional graining are commonly used in our build methods and are not considered defects. Hood liners and blowers are sold separately and in many cases will ship separately from the wood hood.
IMPORTANT WOODWORKING INFORMATION: You should choose a licensed electrician, and/or HVAC Contractor, and a cabinet installation professional to assist with the install. Above all, ensure you are meeting all building codes in your area. While this installation is not difficult, you must have electrical, ventilation, and finish carpentry skills. You may need to cut, sand, chisel, remove “ribs”, install supports and other basic woodworking functions to complete the install. PLEASE NOTE: The product images displayed are computer generated renderings, and actual colors & wood grain may vary depending on the device you're viewing them on. For a clearer understanding of our products and their colors, we recommend exploring our gallery, contacting us directly, or requesting color samples. We're here to ensure you have the most accurate information possible!

shipping_return.title: LTL Shipping – Residential
shipping_return.description:
Due to the size of our hoods, your shipment will come via LTL shipping. If you are not familiar with this type of shipping, there are a few differences from a UPS or FedEx shipping company. The LTL company will call you the day before to schedule your delivery. You MUST schedule your appointment or your item will not be shipped. The LTL driver will provide what is called curbside delivery. They will not bring the item into your house. Please be prepared to receive the shipment, note any shipping related damage on the bill of lading, and bring the item to a safe location.

Turnaround Times

Standard lead times for any wood hood product is 25-30 business days. If you choose our Rush Manufacturing option, your hood will be constructed in 20 business days or less.

Shipping Times

Please allow up to 7 business days for shipping.

shipping_return.title: Custom Color Match Program
shipping_return.description:
We offer two types of color matching to ensure your range hood meets your exact specifications:

Sherwin-Williams Color Match

While customizing your range hood, you have the option to enter a Sherwin-Williams (SW) color code. This allows us to match the color precisely, ensuring your hood blends perfectly with your existing design.

Selecting this option will extend the lead time by one week to accommodate the custom color matching process.

Physical Color Match

If you prefer, you can choose the "Physical Color Match" option during customization. Simply send us a physical sample of the color you want matched.

Turnaround Time

Our current turnaround time for custom color match range hoods is 30-35 business days. This does not include shipping time. Please allow up to 7 business days for shipping.

shipping_return.title: Return Policy
shipping_return.description:
No returns are accepted for custom hoods. If damage is noted, we will gladly supply you with a replacement hood. Please be sure to indicate damage on the bill of lading from the shipping company.

You may return other items in their original condition with the original packaging within 30 days of receipt of the shipment. Product must be shipped back, at your expense, prior to the expiration of the 30-day window. We will issue a full refund for the price of any item you return that is in new condition. We do not accept returns where modification to the product occurred, or installation was attempted. Before staining or finishing an unfinished hood, please consult a professional or call us for suggested finish products. Certain consumer products will not provide the finish quality you may desire. We accept no responsibility for any scheduling mishaps, regardless of the situation.

In Stock, hoods are sold as-is and can only be returned if there is shipping damage. If there is damage to an in-stock hood before it is shipped, it will be noted on the product page.

Our hoods are made from cabinet-grade plywood with a white maple veneer. Brass and Steel Accents are created using a cabinet-grade laminate adhered to a white maple veneer.

Hoodsly’s wood range hoods come in an array of designs and colors to match your kitchen perfectly. Get your wood range hood in raw, primed/paint ready, or stained/painted. Designed to be both elegant and effective, each wood range hood was built with our proprietary two-piece construction for easy installation, allowing for simple cleaning and easy access to fan and ducting.

Our Trimless Style hoods are only compatible with our TradeWinds ventilation units

We only recommend cleaning your range hood with CLEAR, FRAGRANCE-FREE Dawn dish soap. View full cleaning instructions.

data.title: Curved With Strapping Quick Ship
data.description:
Hoodsly’s Quick Ship program offers our Curved Range Hoods in raw or white, ready to complement your kitchen with timeless style and quick delivery. Designed to be both elegant and effective, each wood range hood is built with our Proprietary Two-Piece Construction for easy installation, allowing for simple cleaning and effortless access to the fan and ducting.

PLEASE NOTE: Due to the trim, Quick Ship range hoods will be 1.5" wider than the ordered size. For example, a 30" range hood will measure 31.5"W.

Our hoods are made from cabinet-grade plywood with a white maple veneer.

IMPORTANT STAIN INFORMATION: Hoodsly is not responsible for improper staining or painting techniques used to finish a raw hood. We strongly suggest spraying a professional-grade, pre-catalyzed lacquer, from brands such as Gemini, Mohawk, ML Campbell, and Acroma Pro. Wiping Stains, such as Minwax, are not recommended and we highly suggest using a professional product and method. Wiping stains can cause inconsistent staining during the application of the stain. Wood filler, pin nails, knots, mineralization, and multi-dimensional graining are commonly used in our build methods and are not considered defects.

Hood liners and blowers are sold separately and in many cases will ship separately from the wood hood.

IMPORTANT WOODWORKING INFORMATION: You should choose a licensed electrician, and/or HVAC Contractor, and a cabinet installation professional to assist with the install. Above all, ensure you are meeting all building codes in your area. While this installation is not difficult, you must have electrical, ventilation, and finish carpentry skills. You may need to cut, sand, chisel, remove “ribs”, install supports and other basic woodworking functions to complete the install.

PLEASE NOTE: The product images displayed are computer generated renderings, and actual colors & wood grain may vary depending on the device you're viewing them on.
